exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
# skeptic: fixture del packet
import os, tempfile

def write_atomic(path, text):
    path = Path(path)
    tmp = path.with_name(path.name + ".tmp")
    tmp.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(tmp, path)

td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
dest = td / "out.txt"
write_atomic(dest, "id,nombre\nC001,Ana\n")
print("ok")

from pathlib import Path
# skeptic: fixture del packet
import os, tempfile

def write_atomic(path, text):
    path = Path(path)
    tmp = path.with_name(path.name + ".tmp")
    tmp.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(tmp, path)

td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
dest = td / "out.txt"
dest.write_text("PARCIAL", encoding="utf-8")
print(dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
write_atomic(dest, "COMPLETO")
print(dest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

from pathlib import Path
# skeptic: fixture del packet
import csv, tempfile
td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
q = td / "q.csv"

    w.writerow({"raw": "C1,Ana,x", "reason": "col_count"})

exercises.code:
# skeptic B
sources = [
    {"name": "clients.csv", "sha256": "abc", "n_in": 3, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 1},
    {"name": "transactions.json", "sha256": "def", "n_in": 2, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 0},
]
for s in sources:
    s["reconcile_ok"] = s["n_in"] == s["n_clean"] + s["n_quarantine"]
print({"run_id": "run-01", "sources": sources,
       "total_in": sum(s["n_in"] for s in sources),
       "total_clean": sum(s["n_clean"] for s in sources),
       "total_quarantine": sum(s["n_quarantine"] for s in sources)})

exercises.code:
def reconcile_sources(sources):
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    per = all(s["n_in"] == s["n_clean"] + s["n_quarantine"] for s in sources)
    tot = sum(s["n_in"] for s in sources) == sum(s["n_clean"] + s["n_quarantine"] for s in sources)
    return per and tot
good = [{"n_in": 3, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 1}, {"n_in": 2, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 0}]
bad = [{"name": "a", "n_in": 3, "n_clean": 1, "n_quarantine": 1}, {"name": "b", "n_in": 2, "n_clean": 3, "n_quarantine": 0}]
print("good", reconcile_sources(good))
print("compensated_bad", reconcile_sources(bad))

exercises.code:
def run(sources):
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    broken = [s["name"] for s in sources if s["n_in"] != s["n_clean"] + s["n_quarantine"]]
    if broken:
        print("broken", broken, "exit_code", 1)
        return 1
    print("publish", "exit_code", 0)
    return 0
run([{"name": "clients.csv", "n_in": 3, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 1},
     {"name": "transactions.json", "n_in": 2, "n_clean": 2, "n_quarantine": 0}])
run([{"name": "clients.csv", "n_in": 3, "n_clean": 1, "n_quarantine": 1},
     {"name": "transactions.json", "n_in": 2, "n_clean": 3, "n_quarantine": 0}])

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic B, S08 Q0: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Evita depender del locale del SO (p. ej. Windows)». Motivo desde theory del packet: encoding utf-8 evita depender del locale del SO (p. ej. Windows) al abrir texto con Path (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S08 Q1: descarté distractores y me quedé con «escribir temp y os.replace al destino». Motivo desde theory del packet: escritura atómica escribe temp y usa os.replace al destino (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S08 Q2: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Ir a cuarentena con motivo». Motivo desde theory del packet: filas irregulares van a cuarentena con motivo, no se ignoran en silencio (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S08 Q3: descarté distractores y me quedé con «n_in == n_clean + n_quarantine». Motivo desde theory del packet: reconciliación del manifest exige n_in == n_clean + n_quarantine (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S08 Q4: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Fallar (exit non-zero) / fail closed». Motivo desde theory del packet: si reconcile falla el pipeline debe fallar (exit non-zero) / fail closed (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

confusion_points: S08-T4-B: el caso compensated_bad (totales cuadran, fuente rota) no traía números fijos en starter; lo construí desde theory de reconcile por fuente.
